title: Ferrybridge Multifuel 2 generating station: non-material change (2025), Planning Act 2008
body: "Decision by the Secretary of State on an application for a non-material change relating to an energy from waste project.  Date of decision  25 April 2025  Company / location   Enfinium LtdNear KnottingleyWest Yorkshire   Type of project / consent requested  Non-material consent under the Planning Act 2008. "

taxons.title: Energy industry and infrastructure licensing and regulation
